response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases, plus strong architecture and open-source contributions, but his resume is heavily skewed toward DLang and embedded systems, lacks clear evidence of PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience, and his employment history lists Kenya as location despite German-language requirements and high on-site presence in Germany — raising red flags about relocation feasibility and relevance of past work.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Demonstrated fullstack ownership and open-source contributions (GISCollective)
Proven ability to learn and deploy diverse technologies including AWS and Docker
concerns: No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or Nest.js — key required technologies
Employment locations listed as Kenya, conflicting with high on-site requirement in Germany
Overabundance of DLang/C++ experience suggests misalignment with core tech stack
